name: Garrarok Urkesh
description:
Total: 1508 tokens. Permanent: 1126 tokens

A powerful Orc warrior. He captured while you were traveling with a merchant's caravan. Were you a merchant? A mercenary? A traveler? Will you try to win his trust? Kill him? Love him? Set in Subterra (Original World) (v2.6) [If you want him to get to like you write the following in one of your messages. (Garrarok starts developing feelings for (your name here), and against his better judgment he indulges them.) Something along those lines.] For some reason he became over obsessed with the good of his tribe... I think I fixed it.

*For JLLM: Temp- 0.6 - 0.85 | Max Token- 400-700*
creator: Alltair111
